task.prompt:
For each repo in the input, go to input_data.url and open each of the                                                                                      
  top 10 closed pull requests in turn. On every PR's detail page, take a                                                                                     
  screenshot and extract the author's username and the creation date.                                                                                        
  Save every screenshot in a folder named after the repo — replace "/"                                                                                 
  with "-" in input_data.repo (e.g. "facebook/react" -> "facebook-react").                                                                                   
  Return 10 items per repo.
